tasks.subject: Task 1: Date primitives — weekday + daysUntil
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the private `parseLocalDate` helper, weekday name arrays, and the two primitive functions `weekday` and `daysUntil`, with table-driven tests.

**Files:**
- Modify: `mobile/lib/date.ts` (append after `formatMonthYear`)
- Test: `mobile/lib/date.test.ts` (append; add `daysUntil`, `weekday` to the import)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- weekday(iso) returns short name; weekday(iso, true) returns long name.
- daysUntil(iso, today) returns whole calendar days across month/year boundaries.
- daysUntil(iso) defaults today to todayLocalISO().
- date.test.ts passes.

**Verify:** cd mobile && node --import tsx --test lib/date.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/lib/date.ts", "mobile/lib/date.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && node --import tsx --test lib/date.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["weekday returns short/long names", "daysUntil returns whole calendar days across month/year boundaries", "daysUntil defaults today to todayLocalISO()", "date.test.ts passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Label helpers — formatWeekdayDate + relativeLabel + countdownLabel
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the three label functions that compose the primitives, with table-driven tests covering every branch and boundary.

**Files:**
- Modify: `mobile/lib/date.ts` (append after `daysUntil`)
- Test: `mobile/lib/date.test.ts` (append; add the three names to the import)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- formatWeekdayDate('2026-06-19') -> 'Friday, Jun 19'.
- relativeLabel: Tonight(0)/Tomorrow(1)/This <Weekday>(2-6)/Next <Weekday>(7-13)/full(>=14 or past).
- countdownLabel: tonight(0)/tomorrow(1)/yesterday(-1)/in N days(>1)/N days ago(<-1).
- date.test.ts passes.

**Verify:** cd mobile && just check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/lib/date.ts", "mobile/lib/date.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["formatWeekdayDate renders 'Friday, Jun 19'", "relativeLabel covers Tonight/Tomorrow/This/Next/full with boundaries", "countdownLabel covers tonight/tomorrow/yesterday/in N days/N days ago", "date.test.ts passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
